title: Crunchy Garlic Indian Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free and easy-to-make dish featuring a garlicky, crunchy texture with the addition of chives to add more depth of flavor and aroma.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots, onions), sliced
3 tbsp gluten-free yogurt or sour cream (optional)
Handful of fresh chives, thinly sliced

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add mixed vegetables and green chilies. Stir-fry for another 5 minutes, or until the vegetables are just tender-crisp.
Stir in grated ginger, soy sauce, and chopped scallions. Let it simmer for a minute.
Pour in gluten-free yogurt (if using) to create a creamy sauce. Mix well.
Garnish with sliced chives before serving hot.
